title: Typed window ranking per category ordered by recency
prompt: Starting from `test_fixtures/fragment_window_fn.ex`, rewrite `MyApp.Blog.Rankings.posts_ranked_per_category/0` entirely. The target form: each post gets a `rank` column computed by `row_number() |> over(partition_by: p.category_id, order_by: [desc: p.inserted_at])`. Select a map `%{id, title, category_id, rank}`. No fragments, no raw SQL. Write to `lib/my_app/blog/rankings.ex`.
tier_rationale: Must know the full typed form including partition_by in a keyword list (not inline), plus use it inside a map select. Fragment form is the default Claude reach.
